title: TECHSAVVY
subtitle: Website & Systems
summary: Official website and supporting digital systems built to strengthen TECHSAVVY Community's online presence and support its programs, events, partnerships, and future services.
overview: The TECHSAVVY website and supporting systems serve as the community's central digital hub. The platform presents the organization's programs, events, partnerships, and technology initiatives while providing a scalable foundation for future digital services.
problem: TECHSAVVY needed a centralized digital platform that could clearly represent the organization, communicate its programs and partnerships, and support the community's continued growth beyond social media.
role: Full Stack Web Developer and community technology lead, responsible for translating organizational requirements into the platform's frontend, backend services, and extensible content structure.
solution: Designed and developed a responsive Nuxt.js interface with Tailwind CSS and built supporting backend services using Django REST Framework and PostgreSQL. The system uses reusable components and APIs so the platform can expand as new community programs and digital services are introduced.
features: Responsive official website for community programs and initiatives
Centralized presentation of events, partnerships, and organizational information
Reusable frontend components for future platform expansion
RESTful backend services supporting structured platform content
Scalable foundation for future TECHSAVVY digital services

technicalDecisions.reason: Used to create a fast, responsive interface with reusable Vue components.
Used to structure organizational content and supporting services behind reusable API endpoints.
The platform was structured for continued expansion as TECHSAVVY introduces additional programs and digital services.

challenges: Designing a platform broad enough to represent TECHSAVVY's programs, events, partnerships, and technology initiatives without locking the organization into a rigid single-purpose website.
outcomes: Established a centralized digital platform for TECHSAVVY Community and created a maintainable foundation for presenting organizational initiatives and expanding future digital services.
